requirement_topic.en: Import Clearance, NOM Evidence, and Lithium Battery Transport Documents
requirement_topic.zh: 进口清关、NOM 证据与锂电池运输文件
requirement_topic.zht: 進口清關、NOM 證據與鋰電池運輸文件

summary.en: BESS shipments into Mexico require correct tariff classification, importer-of-record controls, commercial invoice and packing documents, Spanish product information where required, and NOM compliance evidence for covered electrical or energy-efficiency products. Lithium batteries and battery systems also need transport documentation such as UN 38.3 test summaries, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging, marks, and carrier acceptance according to the chosen transport mode. Customs treatment should be aligned before shipment because NOM certificates or exemption letters may need to be linked to the importer, model, and tariff item.
summary.zh: BESS 输往墨西哥需要正确的税则归类、登记进口商控制、商业发票和装箱文件、必要时的西班牙语产品信息，以及覆盖电气或能效产品的 NOM 合规证据。锂电池和电池系统还需要运输文件，例如 UN 38.3 测试摘要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装、标记以及按运输方式取得承运人接受。清关处理应在出货前对齐，因为 NOM 证书或豁免文件可能需要与进口商、型号和税号关联。
summary.zht: BESS 輸往墨西哥需要正確的稅則歸類、登記進口商控制、商業發票和裝箱文件、必要時的西班牙語產品資訊，以及覆蓋電氣或能效產品的 NOM 合規證據。鋰電池和電池系統還需要運輸文件，例如 UN 38.3 測試摘要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝、標記以及按運輸方式取得承運人接受。清關處理應在出貨前對齊，因為 NOM 證書或豁免文件可能需要與進口商、型號和稅號關聯。

standards_or_laws: Ley Aduanera and Mexican customs rules
NOM compliance at point of import for covered products
UN 38.3 lithium battery transport test summary
Applicable sea, air, or road dangerous-goods rules

summary.en: Chinese exporters typically prepare customs declarations, commodity inspection records where applicable, UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, dangerous-goods transport certificates, and battery test summaries. These documents are important shipment inputs, but they do not determine Mexican tariff classification, NOM import compliance, importer eligibility, or Mexico-specific certificate linkage.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常准备报关资料、适用时的商检记录、UN 38.3 报告、MSDS/SDS、危险货物运输证书和电池测试摘要。这些文件是重要出货输入，但不能决定墨西哥税则归类、NOM 进口合规、进口商资格或墨西哥特定证书关联。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常準備報關資料、適用時的商檢記錄、UN 38.3 報告、MSDS/SDS、危險貨物運輸證書和電池測試摘要。這些文件是重要出貨輸入，但不能決定墨西哥稅則歸類、NOM 進口合規、進口商資格或墨西哥特定證書關聯。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code / ICAO TI / IATA DGR documentation as applicable

gap.en: The import gap is linking the technical compliance file to the customs file. A BESS may contain multiple tariff lines and multiple NOM-triggering components. The importer should confirm whether each component needs a NOM certificate, whether an exception applies, whether the certificate holder matches the transaction, and whether lithium battery dangerous-goods documents match the exact cell, module, rack, and installed configuration.
gap.zh: 进口差距在于将技术合规文件与海关文件关联。一个 BESS 可能包含多个税号和多个触发 NOM 的组件。进口商应确认每个组件是否需要 NOM 证书、是否适用例外、证书持有人是否与交易匹配，以及锂电池危险货物文件是否匹配具体电芯、模组、电池架和安装配置。
gap.zht: 進口差距在於將技術合規文件與海關文件關聯。一個 BESS 可能包含多個稅號和多個觸發 NOM 的組件。進口商應確認每個組件是否需要 NOM 證書、是否適用例外、證書持有人是否與交易匹配，以及鋰電池危險貨物文件是否匹配具體電芯、模組、電池架和安裝配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for import — customs classification, importer controls, and NOM evidence or valid exception must be resolved before clearance for covered goods
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China export and dangerous-goods shipment where applicable, but not a substitute for Mexican import clearance

source.publisher: Secretaria de Economia / Gobierno de Mexico

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Align the BOM, tariff classification, NOM certificates or exceptions, importer record, and lithium battery transport documents before loading. Mexican customs can block or delay BESS shipments when NOM evidence is missing, model-mismatched, or not linked to the importer and tariff treatment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 装运前应对齐物料清单、税则归类、NOM 证书或例外、进口商记录和锂电池运输文件。当 NOM 证据缺失、型号不匹配或未与进口商和税务处理关联时，墨西哥海关可能阻止或延迟 BESS 货物。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 裝運前應對齊物料清單、稅則歸類、NOM 證書或例外、進口商記錄和鋰電池運輸文件。當 NOM 證據缺失、型號不匹配或未與進口商和稅務處理關聯時，墨西哥海關可能阻止或延遲 BESS 貨物。
